channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Browns QB Deshaun Watson ruptured his Achilles tendon and is out for the season, AP source says
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Browns quarterback Deshaun Watson will miss the rest of Cleveland's season after rupturing his right Achilles tendon on Sunday against Cincinnati, a person familiar with the situation told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tampa Bay, Baltimore playing a different brand of football in 2024
item.description: In the early 2000s, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and the Baltimore Ravens were synonymous with great defense in the NFL, but now they are playing a different brand of football.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Lynx head coach says WNBA title was 'stolen from us' in scathing remarks about referees
item.description: Minnesota Lynx head coach Cheryl Reeve blasted officials after losing the WNBA title, saying that the championship was "stolen from us.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tiger Woods to make TGL indoor league debut the 2nd week of the season after NFL wild-card weekend
item.description: Tiger Woods makes his debut in the second week of the indoor TMRW Golf League, part of a schedule released Monday that has the six teams wrapping up the inaugural season on ESPN two weeks before the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers report card: Punchless offense, porous run defense key another loss to Chiefs
item.description: The 49ers fell to 3-4 as their offense loses more players and their defense fails again to thwart the Chiefs and Patrick Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon is No. 1 for first time since 2012; Vanderbilt enters poll and Michigan drops out
item.description: Oregon became the fourth team this season to hold the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press college football poll, moving into the top spot on Sunday for the first time in 12 years after Texas lost at home to Georgia. Vanderbilt made its first appearance since the 2013 season, at No.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson gives update on injury right after Detroit Lions win over Vikings
item.description: Detroit Lions star Aidan Hutchinson gave an update on his injury right after the team’s big win over the Minnesota Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: AP Top 25 Extra Points: As 4th team to reach No. 1 this season, Oregon's rise is sign of the times
item.description: This college football season is delivering when it comes to unpredictability and entertainment value.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jonquel Jones delivers WNBA Finals MVP performance to bail out Ice-cold Ionescu and Stewart
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sabrina Ionescu's first shot hit the side of the backboard. Another one soon after hit nothing at all. After making one of the most memorable shots in WNBA history to win Game 3, the All-Star guard became Ice-cold Ionescu the rest of the way.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ricky Pearsall gives 49ers a lift with his return. But they lose Brandon Aiyuk to a knee injury
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers got a lift from rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall making his NFL debut exactly 50 days after being shot in the chest but might have lost starting receiver Brandon Aiyuk to a significant knee injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Commanders rookie phenom Jayden Daniels slams helmet in frustration after suffering rib injury vs Panthers
item.description: Washington Commanders rookie quarterback Jayden Daniels was seen slamming his helmet in frustration on the sideline after suffering a rib injury against the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Packers' new kicker Brandon McManus buries game-winning field goal to beat Texans
item.description: Brandon McManus, making his return to the NFL this week with the Green Bay Packers, kicked a 45-yard game-winning field goal to beat the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions drill field goal in final seconds to hand Vikings first loss of season
item.description: The Detroit Lions blew their double-digit lead to the Minnesota Vikings, but were able to kick a field goal in the final seconds to come away with another victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon is No. 1 for first time since 2012; Vanderbilt enters poll and Michigan drops out
item.description: Oregon has become the fourth team this season to hold the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press college football poll.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: The New York Liberty finally have a WNBA championship after beating the Minnesota Lynx 67-62 in overtime of a decisive Game 5 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WNBA Finals reach Game 5 for first time since 2019, Liberty head back to New York
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It's fitting that a record-breaking season for the WNBA would come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 of its Finals. For the first time since 2019, the league championship will go the distance. This one will be in New York on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utes offensive struggles continue in 13-7 loss to TCU
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team hit a new low Saturday night, with an extremely disappointing 13-7 loss to TCU at Rice-Eccles Stadium. The offense managed just one touchdown, while freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson was sacked four times.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Saquon Barkley returns to MetLife — with the Eagles
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Former Giants running back Saquon Barkley will step back inside MetLife Stadium on Sunday as a member of the Eagles. Newsday Giants beat reporter Kim Jones joins New York Blitz to discuss what to expect from fans and why Barkley wasn’t a Giant “for life.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Christian Barmore apologizes to Rhode Island police after racism remarks
item.description: Patriots defensive tackle Christian Barmore issued an apology on social media to the Providence Police Department after he accused officers of racism during a recent traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Raymond Baccari, NewsNation

item.title: Real Salt Lake legend reflects on his journey, leadership, and life beyond the pitch
item.description: Real Salt Lake legend and current Vancouver Whitecaps FC standout Damir Kreilach joins Royal Riot co-host Mattey Casey for an exclusive interview, just ahead of his much-anticipated return to America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: The domed ballpark would have a 373,000-square-foot footprint and is expected to reach a height of 320 feet.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: Amari Cooper went from a fading No. 1 wide receiver in Cleveland to a top one with Buffalo. Looking to add a playmaker for quarterback Josh Allen, the Bills acquired Cooper on Tuesday in a trade with the skidding Browns, whose season seems to be unraveling by the week with the NFL’s worst offense.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Caleb Williams and the Bears are looking good at their bye with 3 straight wins and a 4-2 mark
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Caleb Williams is settling into a rhythm, and the Bears are racking up wins. Overall, things are looking good for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ricky Pearsall returns to the 49ers practice for the first time since shooting
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall returned to the field for practice on Monday for the first time since he was shot in the chest during an attempted robbery nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Los Angeles Clippers to make Intuit Dome debut Monday
item.description: For the first time in one quarter of a century, the Los Angeles Clippers will play a home game in their own, exclusive arena on Monday night. That's because the Intuit Dome, the $2 billion Inglewood arena, is now open seven years after it was first announced to be in the works.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
